qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_reclutado as ID, t.c_reclutado as CODE, t.oi_reclutado as TEXT, t.oi_personal_emp, t.oi_postulante, t.oi_referencia as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: POSTULANTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM sel01_postulante as p1 where p1.oi_postulante = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_postulante%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL as p1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p2 JOIN p1.oi_personal INNER p2.oi_personal where p2.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_referencia as ID, t.c_referencia as CODE, t.d_referencia as TEXT, t.oi_req as PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS as t WHERE t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_req as ID, t.c_req as CODE, t.d_req as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL02_REQ as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_empresa={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_req as ID, t.c_req as CODE, t.d_req as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL02_REQ as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_req={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_referencia as ID, t.c_referencia as CODE, t.d_referencia as TEXT, t.oi_req as PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS as t WHERE t.c_referencia={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_req={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_reclutado as ID, t.c_reclutado as CODE, t.oi_reclutado as TEXT, t.oi_personal_emp, t.oi_postulante, t.oi_referencia as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_reclutado={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: POSTULANTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM sel01_postulante as p1 where p1.oi_postulante = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_postulante%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL as p1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p2 JOIN p1.oi_personal INNER p2.oi_personal where p2.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_referencia as ID, t.c_referencia as CODE, t.d_referencia as TEXT, t.oi_req as PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS as t WHERE t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_req as ID, t.c_req as CODE, t.d_req as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL02_REQ as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_reclutado as ID, t.c_reclutado as CODE, t.oi_reclutado as TEXT, t.oi_referencia as PID, t.oi_personal_emp, t.oi_postulante, SEC.policy
FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: POSTULANTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM sel01_postulante as p1 where p1.oi_postulante = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_postulante%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL as p1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p2 JOIN p1.oi_personal INNER p2.oi_personal where p2.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_referencia as ID, t.c_referencia as CODE, t.d_referencia as TEXT, t.oi_req as PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS as t WHERE t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_req as ID, t.c_req as CODE, t.d_req as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM SEL02_REQ as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS5
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t.oi_referencia from SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t where t.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_reclutado as ID, t.c_reclutado as CODE, t.oi_reclutado as TEXT, t.oi_referencia as PID, t.oi_personal_emp, t.oi_postulante, SEC.policy FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: POSTULANTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM sel01_postulante as p1 where p1.oi_postulante = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_postulante%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT p1.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL as p1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p2 JOIN p1.oi_personal INNER p2.oi_personal where p2.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp%} ')/ROWS/ROW
